name: zvideo_dd_report_error
description: zVideo_dd::ReportError maps DirectDraw/Direct3D HRESULTs to report text, reports failures, returns zero for DD_OK, and queries memory counters for DDERR_OUTOFVIDEOMEMORY.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 2851 unmasked mismatches after masking 28 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 2889 bytes and the VC object body is 208 bytes with 9 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.

The reviewed failure is source-organization drift: the current source factors the HRESULT-name decision tree into GetDirectDrawErrorName, while the original inlines the large switch/tree in ReportError.

The native smoke verifies DD_OK returns zero without memory queries, a named DirectDraw error reports failure, and DDERR_OUTOFVIDEOMEMORY triggers both texture-memory and device-memory query dispatches.
